notes: Refined the masthead into a minimal Apparatus-family utility bar and added one homepage dispatch eyebrow.
Rebuilt the global footer as an Ft7 garden colophon and replaced the invented masthead diamond with the Apparatus regmark family.
Applied the Regmark System Note contract: crosshair for identity and colophon, quartered ring for theme utility, brackets for the garden-state section frame.
Kept Seed, Sprout, and Evergreen as plain maturity labels rather than assigning ambiguous icons to them.
No publication state or taxonomy changes.
No design.md emitted before visual review.
